Here are the top-performing ETFs in first half of 2023 as crypto-related funds soar
2 Stocks With Huge Blockchain Growth Tailwinds
Global X ETFs Announces Eight ETF Reverse Stock Splits

holdings.infoBox: BKCH is an equity ETF with a total of 35 individual holdings. The top holdings are IREN Limited stock at 12.50%, Coinbase Global at 9.06%, Circle Internet Group at 8.56%, Hut 8 at 6.08%, and Riot Platforms at 5.67%.

overview.description: The Global X Blockchain ETF (BKCH) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Solactive Blockchain index, a market-cap-weighted index of global companies involved in blockchain technologies. BKCH was launched on Jul 12, 2021 and is issued by Global X.
